pi_items.metadata_value: Speed up hotel lookups by name in the travel agency application
pi_items.verified_value: Creating an index on Hotels.Name will improve query performance for lookups by hotel name
pi_items.source: Standard database indexing principle confirmed by verifier.py checking index existence. Task context is travel agency application using real hotel data.

privileged_info_summary: The create_index task uses a travel agency database (demodb) containing 15 real hotels with verified addresses including Hotel Artemide (Rome, Via Nazionale 22, 4-star), Hotel Adlon Kempinski (Berlin, Unter den Linden 77, 5-star), Hôtel de Crillon (Paris, 10 Place de la Concorde, 5-star), The Plaza Hotel (New York, 768 Fifth Avenue, 5-star), Park Hyatt Tokyo (Nishi Shinjuku, 5-star), and Four Seasons Sydney (199 George Street, 5-star). The task requires creating a NOTUNIQUE index on the Hotels.Name property named 'Hotels.Name' using credentials root:GymAnything123! at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html. The database also seeds real restaurants (Da Enzo al 29 in Rome, Narisawa in Tokyo with 2 Michelin stars, Le Cinq in Paris with 3 Michelin stars) and real countries. This is not synthetic data but based on actual real-world establishments.
